title: NoVaultLimit
description: NoVaultLimit removes the open-once-per-player mechanic from the new vaults.
body:
# Open trial vaults an infinite number of times!
NoVaultLimit removes the open-once-per-player mechanic from the new trial vaults. Now both the normal vault and the ominous vault will always remain in their active state no matter how often they have been opened. This way you can now test your skills in the trial chambers multiple times and always receive good loot from the vaults without having to search a new unopened vault.

NoVaultLimit **only needs to be installed on the server, installing it on the client is optional**. Somehow Modrinth keeps changing the client compatibility from "optional" to "unsupported", but **I can assure you that the mod is running perfectly fine when installed on a client**.

## Images

A vault during its normal ejecting phase:
![A vault during its normal ejecting phase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4cf5b9f121e0295356067667b50d2474da59cb8f.png)

A vault directly after its ejecting phase: You can immediately open it again using another trial key!
![A vault directly after its ejecting phase. You can immediately open it again using another trial key!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/93ab8560afafbdf1c0f1032c2a2ca28cb2bf585f.png)

# Support
If you have any issues or requests, feel free to contact me via discord. Add me using "skytendo06".
